subcodes.first_line: ...It behoveth the servant to pray to and seek assistance from God, and to supplicate and implore His aid.  Such becometh the rank of servitude, and the Lord will decree whatsoever He desireth, in accordance with His consummate wisdom
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بنفحات الله انی قرئت تحریرک المورخ ۲۵ ینایر سنه ۱۹۰۳ و اطلعت
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @the state of prayer; dynamics of prayer
